result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= date
LINE 9:     AND createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01' AND createddate < D...
                            ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH hist AS (
  SELECT
    caseid__c AS case_id,
    createddate,
    oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    newvalue__c AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c ILIKE '%%owner%%'
    AND createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01' AND createddate < DATE '2023-04-01'
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT
    old_owner AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM hist
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(old_owner) <> ''
    AND new_owner IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(new_owner) <> ''
    AND TRIM(old_owner) <> TRIM(new_owner)
  GROUP BY old_owner
),
handled AS (
  SELECT ownerid AS agent_id, COUNT(*)::bigint AS handled_cases
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01' AND createddate < DATE '2023-04-01'
    AND ownerid IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(ownerid) <> ''
  GROUP BY ownerid
),
agents AS (
  SELECT agent_id FROM transfers
  UNION
  SELECT agent_id FROM handled
)
SELECT a.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM agents a
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON TRIM(t.agent_id)=TRIM(a.agent_id)
LEFT JOIN handled h ON TRIM(h.agent_id)=TRIM(a.agent_id)
WHERE COALESCE(h.handled_cases,0) > 0
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) ASC, TRIM(a.agent_id) ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH hist AS (
  SELECT
    caseid__c AS case_id,
    createddate,
    oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    newvalue__c AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c ILIKE '%owner%'
    AND createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01' AND createddate < DATE '2023-04-01'
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT
    old_owner AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM hist
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(old_owner) <> ''
    AND new_owner IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(new_owner) <> ''
    AND TRIM(old_owner) <> TRIM(new_owner)
  GROUP BY old_owner
),
handled AS (
  SELECT ownerid AS agent_id, COUNT(*)::bigint AS handled_cases
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01' AND createddate < DATE '2023-04-01'
    AND ownerid IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(ownerid) <> ''
  GROUP BY ownerid
),
agents AS (
  SELECT agent_id FROM transfers
  UNION
  SELECT agent_id FROM handled
)
SELECT a.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM agents a
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON TRIM(t.agent_id)=TRIM(a.agent_id)
LEFT JOIN handled h ON TRIM(h.agent_id)=TRIM(a.agent_id)
WHERE COALESCE(h.handled_cases,0) > 0
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) ASC, TRIM(a.agent_id) ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH hist AS (
  SELECT
    caseid__c AS case_id,
    createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
    oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    newvalue__c AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c ILIKE '%owner%'
    AND createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-01' AND createddate::timestamp < TIMESTAMP '2023-04-01'
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT
    old_owner AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM hist
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(old_owner) <> ''
    AND new_owner IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(new_owner) <> ''
    AND TRIM(old_owner) <> TRIM(new_owner)
  GROUP BY old_owner
),
handled AS (
  SELECT ownerid AS agent_id, COUNT(*)::bigint AS handled_cases
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-01' AND createddate::timestamp < TIMESTAMP '2023-04-01'
    AND ownerid IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(ownerid) <> ''
  GROUP BY ownerid
),
agents AS (
  SELECT agent_id FROM transfers
  UNION
  SELECT agent_id FROM handled
)
SELECT a.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM agents a
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON TRIM(t.agent_id)=TRIM(a.agent_id)
LEFT JOIN handled h ON TRIM(h.agent_id)=TRIM(a.agent_id)
WHERE COALESCE(h.handled_cases,0) > 0
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) ASC, TRIM(a.agent_id) ASC
LIMIT 1;
